_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "canvas_folders" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "position" REAL NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "canvases" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_opened_at" INTEGER NULL, "thumbnail_path" TEXT NULL, "is_archived" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_archived" IN (0, 1)), "folder_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES canvas_folders (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "world_origin_x" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "world_origin_y" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "vp_tx" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "vp_ty" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "vp_scale" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0, "vp_rotation" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "background_kind" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "canvas_elements" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "canvas_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES canvases (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "kind" INTEGER NOT NULL, "x" REAL NOT NULL, "y" REAL NOT NULL, "width" REAL NOT NULL, "height" REAL NOT NULL, "rotation" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "z_index" REAL NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ink_strokes" ("element_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES canvas_elements (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "points" BLOB NOT NULL, "point_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "color" INTEGER NOT NULL, "stroke_width" REAL NOT NULL, "tool" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_highlighter" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_highlighter" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pdf_documents" ("element_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES canvas_elements (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "file_path" TEXT NOT NULL, "original_filename" TEXT NOT NULL, "page_number" INTEGER NOT NULL, "total_pages" INTEGER NOT NULL, "crop_left" REAL NULL, "crop_top" REAL NULL, "crop_right" REAL NULL, "crop_bottom" REAL NULL, "import_hash" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "images" ("element_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES canvas_elements (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "file_path" TEXT NOT NULL, "intrinsic_width" REAL NOT NULL, "intrinsic_height" REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "canvas_links" ("element_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES canvas_elements (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "link_kind" INTEGER NOT NULL, "url" TEXT NULL, "title" TEXT NULL, "target_canvas_id" TEXT NULL, "target_rect_x" REAL NULL, "target_rect_y" REAL NULL, "target_rect_width" REAL NULL, "target_rect_height" REAL NULL, "target_vp_tx" REAL NULL, "target_vp_ty" REAL NULL, "target_vp_scale" REAL NULL, "target_vp_rotation" REAL NULL, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ritual_checklists" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_default" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_default" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ritual_checklist_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "checklist_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES ritual_checklists (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, "position" REAL NOT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "focus_sessions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "started_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ended_at" INTEGER NULL, "goal_text" TEXT NOT NULL, "pre_energy" INTEGER NOT NULL, "post_energy" INTEGER NULL, "timer_kind" INTEGER NOT NULL, "planned_duration_secs" INTEGER NOT NULL, "actual_focus_secs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "pomodoro_work_secs" INTEGER NULL, "pomodoro_break_secs" INTEGER NULL, "flow_break_ratio" REAL NULL, "cycles_completed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "status" INTEGER NOT NULL, "runtime_status" INTEGER NULL, "runtime_phase" INTEGER NULL, "runtime_phase_started_at" INTEGER NULL, "runtime_carried_phase_secs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "runtime_phase_target_secs" INTEGER NULL, "runtime_banked_focus_secs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "linked_canvas_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES canvases (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "notes" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "focus_session_ritual_checks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "session_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES focus_sessions (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "item_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES ritual_checklist_items (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "item_label_snapshot" TEXT NOT NULL, "was_checked" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("was_checked" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "distractions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "session_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES focus_sessions (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "captured_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "kind" INTEGER NOT NULL, "note" TEXT NOT NULL, "elapsed_secs" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "boards" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "board_type" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "board_columns" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "board_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES boards (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "position" REAL NOT NULL, "color" INTEGER NULL, "wip_limit" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "board_cards" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "column_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES board_columns (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "board_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES boards (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "subtitle" TEXT NULL, "position" REAL NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "revision_card_details" ("card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES board_cards (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "mastery_flag" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_revised_at" INTEGER NULL, "revision_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "goal_card_details" ("card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES board_cards (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "target_date" INTEGER NULL, "status_note" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "card_canvas_attachments" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES board_cards (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "canvas_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES canvases (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, "position" REAL NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("card_id", "canvas_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reflection_templates" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "is_builtin" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_builtin" IN (0, 1)), "schema_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "position" REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reflection_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES board_cards (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "template_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES reflection_templates (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "template_name_snapshot" TEXT NOT NULL, "template_schema_snapshot_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "answers_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "app_settings" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'singleton', "theme_mode" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "default_pomodoro_work_secs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1500, "default_pomodoro_break_secs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 300, "default_flow_break_ratio" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.2, "default_session_length_secs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3000, "keep_screen_on_in_focus" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("keep_screen_on_in_focus" IN (0, 1)), "library_sort" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "onboarding_done" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("onboarding_done" IN (0, 1)), "db_schema_seeded" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("db_schema_seeded" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE INDEX idx_canvases_folder_id ON canvases (folder_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_canvases_updated_at ON canvases (updated_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_canvas_elements_canvas_id ON canvas_elements (canvas_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_canvas_elements_canvas_id_z_index ON canvas_elements (canvas_id, z_index)
CREATE INDEX idx_focus_sessions_started_at ON focus_sessions (started_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_distractions_session_id ON distractions (session_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_board_columns_board_id ON board_columns (board_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_board_cards_column_id_position ON board_cards (column_id, position)
CREATE INDEX idx_board_cards_board_id ON board_cards (board_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_card_canvas_attachments_card_position ON card_canvas_attachments (card_id, position)
CREATE INDEX idx_card_canvas_attachments_canvas_id ON card_canvas_attachments (canvas_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_reflection_entries_card_id ON reflection_entries (card_id)
